_comment: MCP server configuration for NexaBank Policy Assistant. Register this in Claude Desktop or Claude Code to enable direct policy queries via MCP tools.

nexabank-policy-assistant.description: NexaBank Internal Policy Assistant — exposes 5 bank policy documents as searchable MCP tools

tools.name: search_policy
tools.description: Search NexaBank policy knowledge base for an answer to an employee question

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: List all available bank policy documents

tools.name: get_policy_full
tools.description: Get the complete text of a specific policy by code (LP-001, KYC-002, etc.)

tools.name: cross_reference
tools.description: Find all policies relevant to a multi-domain question

tools.name: check_compliance_risk
tools.description: Screen a question for compliance risk keywords
